subject: A flat round incense burner disc with a red stripe, against a soft pastel background
description: The card art shows a smooth, rounded disc object — an incense burner — centered against a soft pastel gradient background in light blues and whites. The disc is dark gray or charcoal in color with a distinctive red horizontal band or stripe across its midsection. The object casts a faint shadow and appears to emit a subtle wisp or shimmer suggesting burning incense, though the smoke itself is not prominently visible. The overall impression is calm and minimal — an everyday ritual object rendered cleanly.
foreground: flat round incense burner with red stripe
background: soft pastel gradient — light blue and white
